free_text: New data for the production of radionuclides in thin
lead target by 660 MeV protons
The lead foil of 30 mm diam.,0.1 mm thickness,
0.703 g weight in stack with Al-foil of the same
diam. were used.
Collective and Microscopic Model Calculations.
The lead foil was irradiated with protons
during to 11 min. The proton flux was 1.8E+11 1/cm2/sec
34 Spectrum measurements from 10 to 60 min.
duration were made during the first 18 hours. The next
ones were carried out after day, 25 days and half of
year.
Details of experiments.
Tbl.1 from 97TRIEST,2,1525,1997
Date is corrected
Last checking has been done.
SD: Corrections in all Subents. Vol. in
ref. corrected (59 -> 2).
No information about source of uncertainty
